name: Long Life Noodles with Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the spinach.
2. Boil the noodles in salted water until cooked through; drain and divide among soup bowls.
3. In the same pot of boiling water, blanch the spinach until just wilted; drain and press dry before chopping coarsely. Add to the bowls with noodles.
4. Heat the chicken broth in a saucepan. Stir in the dark soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and cornstarch paste to thicken slightly.
5. Poach the eggs: Bring 8 quarts of water to a boil in a wok. Carefully add one egg at a time, poaching for about 2 minutes until set.
6. Place each poached egg on top of the spinach in the bowls.
7. Pour the hot soup mixture over the eggs and garnish with minced green onions and ham slices.
8. Serve immediately.
